description_long: This is a porcelain cup with a gently flared rim and a rounded base, featuring intricate hand-painted designs in vibrant colors. The exterior is adorned with traditional Chinese motifs, including roosters, birds, blue foliage, and red flowers, all outlined in fine detail. The cup has a smooth, glossy white background that highlights the vivid blue, red, green, and yellow hues of the artwork. A thin blue line encircles the rim, adding a refined accent to the overall design. The interior is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the decorative exterior. The cup appears lightweight and delicate, typical of fine porcelain ware.
description: A delicate porcelain cup with colorful hand-painted Chinese motifs, including roosters, birds, and floral patterns on a glossy white background.
description_view_0: This view shows a bird and blue foliage motif, with a thin blue rim accent visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a red rooster and another bird, with more of the blue and green foliage extending around the cup.
description_view_2: This view features prominent red flowers and blue foliage, with less emphasis on animal motifs.
description_view_3: This view displays a large red rooster and some blue and green foliage, with the floral pattern less visible.
